ingest_command: bcftools view -f PASS gnomad.v4.1.sv.sites.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/SVTYPE,INFO/SVLEN,INFO/AF,INFO/END' | llmap variant-ingest --source gnomad_sv --kind sv --bucket-bp 100 --output gnomad_sv.priors
notes: Short-read derived SVs. Excellent recall for <1 kb events, lower recall for >10 kb. Pair with HPRC/Audano/Beyter for long-range coverage.
